creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
D7486 commandeered and updated.  Somehow that means I can accept my own revision?

Anyhow: poudriere builds OK for 10.1 amd64 and 10.1 i386.  Builds for 9.3 any arch fail because of a failing dependency (lang/php56).

If anyone wants to add anything, please comment in the phabricator review: I'll commit that tomorrow morning unless there are any objections.
